task: Given Korean equity candidates from a cheap screen, classify each as core survivor, moonshot research prompt, quarantine, or cut. Preserve research-commentary-only framing.

agent_instruction: Underwrite segment economics, defense restructuring, copper sensitivity, export/order quality, valuation after move.
Verify backlog quality, receivables, advances from customers, margins by order type, customer concentration, actual nuclear materiality.
Verify nuclear instrumentation revenue mix, order conversion, customer concentration, margins, project materiality.
Try to kill using launch cadence, revenue materiality, funding/runway, dilution, valuation.
Try to kill using theme exposure, order/revenue support, liquidity/access, filing support.
Try to kill using pipeline support, cash runway, dilution, clinical/regulatory timeline, specialist review.
Try to kill using platform-to-clinical bridge, runway/dilution, valuation, specialist review.
Try to kill using indirect exposure, margin quality, order/customer evidence, liquidity/access.
Do not present as core in this Korea map; may be separate governance work.
Needs stronger balance-sheet/NAV proof and liquidity caveat before public-core use.
Needs property and lease-note work before hard-asset thesis is printable.
